# Development
- [ ] Implementation matches criteria
- [ ] Seed scripts updated
- [ ] Tests written/updated
  - [ ] Nuxt
    - [ ] Components
    - [ ] Composables
  - [ ] Integration
    - [ ] Repositories
    - [ ] API
  - [ ] End-to-End
  - [ ] Unit

# Review
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] Branch merged and deleted
- [ ] Review issue quality
  - [ ] Assignee is set
  - [ ] Labels are assigned
  - [ ] Priority, size, and estimate are adjusted to match actual if necessary
  - [ ] Start date was set and target date is set to date of completion
  - [ ] Relationships and milestones are set (if applicable)
